prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: X-ray crystal structure of putative Universal Stress Protein from Aquifex aeolicus. Entity description: Hypothetical protein AQ_178. Organism: Aquifex aeolicus. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived hydrophobic membrane-like tendency high; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V74 E68 metadata context marks: assembly_context beta_sheet_closure closed_beta_topology oligomer_context partner_copy_context strand_register. Known E68 words are allowed; candidate E69 labels are withheld from prediction. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: public metadata indicates biological copy/oligomer/assembly context

v74_context_policy.context_derivation: V74 E68 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. E68-known words are allowed; candidate E69 words are withheld from prediction text so V74 can discover them.
reasons: public metadata indicates biological copy/oligomer/assembly context
